allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Remove the person from the contaminated area.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep working in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.

immediate_actions.instruction: Keluarkan mangsa dari kawasan yang tercemar.

do_not_do.instruction: Jangan terus bekerja di kawasan tercemar selepas terdedah kepada sedutan.

escalate_now.reason: Pendedahan bahan kimia melalui sedutan memerlukan penilaian klinikal.
